title: Multi-feature filament sheet
abstract: The brush bar for a vacuum cleaner comprises a felt sheet made from multi-filaments The filaments vary in terms of mechanical and electrical properties such as stiffness, abrasion resistance, deflection bend recovery, fatigue recovery, and electrical resistivity characterized by different material, filament diameters, trim length and fillers.
claims: Claims 1. A multifilament felt sheet, comprising filaments that vary in terms of mechanical and electrical properties such as stiffness, abrasion resistance, deflection bend recovery, fatigue recovery, and electrical resistivity characterized by different material, filament diameters, trim length and fillers. 2. The multifilament felt sheet according to claim 1, wherein the thermoplastics elastomers (TPE) used are styrenic block copolymers (TPS), thermoplastic polyolenfmealastomers (TPO), thermoplastic vukanizates (TPV), thermoplastic polyurethanes (TPU), thermoplastic copolyester (TPC) or thermoplastic polyamides (TPA). 3. The multifilament felt sheet according to claim 1, wherein the conductive filaments are synthetic fibers coated with metals such as silver, tin, nickel, stainless steel, or carbon composites. 4. The multifilament felt sheet to claim 1, wherein the abrasives might be borides, carbides, nitrides, oxides, silicates, and metals. 5. The multifilament felt sheet according to claim 1, wherein the length of the filament is in the range of 0.5 to 10 mm. 6. The multifilament felt sheet according to claim 1, wherein the felt sheet is a combination of non-conductive filaments and conductive filaments. 7. The multifilament felt sheet according to claim 1, wherein colorants and colored particles are used to produce colored filaments enable a color code for identifying specific properties.
